title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
